transcript: G'day, I totally understand that you see these outdoor gyms, there's people, they're buff, they've got six packs and you go, oh my god, I could never do that. So today I wanted to take you through a SAM7 which introduces you to an outdoor gym which is a great tool for training. We're going to go back to basics and give you a beginner workout. We'll be right back.
